subject: [PATCH 6/6] nfsd: fix layout fence worker double-reference race

2026-05-31.patch_summary: This patch fixes a double-reference race condition in the NFSd layout fence worker. The issue arises when the workqueue core clears WORK_STRUCT_PENDING before invoking the callback, allowing lm_breaker_timedout() to take a duplicate reference on the layout stateid. To fix this, the patch introduces an ls_fence_inflight boolean flag that is set atomically with refcount_inc_not_zero() under ls_lock and cleared under ls_lock before nfs4_put_stid() on every exit path. This ensures that a fence worker invocation already in progress does not coalesce with a new one, preventing a memory leak of the layout stateid.
